$comment: Single source of truth for version pins and import specifiers. Regenerate the 'pins' block with scripts/doctor.mjs against the installed node_modules. 'latestKnown' reflects what this skill was authored against; treat the installed version (from doctor.mjs) as ground truth and use scripts/docs_lookup.mjs for any signature not covered in a reference file.

importSpecifiers.$comment: three's package.json 'exports' map as of r185. Never deep-import build files directly; always use these specifiers.

cdnImportmap.$comment: For the vanilla-webgl-importmap (no-bundler) template. Pin the exact version. jsDelivr and esm.sh both work; jsDelivr shown. Note: 'three/addons/' resolves via the trailing-slash mapping to the examples/jsm folder on the CDN.

docsResources.$comment: As of r185 the official three.js docs are LLM-first. Prefer these over guessing a signature; scripts/docs_lookup.mjs wraps them. Per-class pages are clean markdown. The raw.githubusercontent URLs are stable and greppable.

breakingChangesHighSignal.$comment: High-confidence, stable facts an emitter must not get wrong. This is NOT the full migration guide — for anything version-specific or uncertain, run scripts/docs_lookup.mjs or read https://github.com/mrdoob/three.js/wiki/Migration-Guide.
removedLongAgo: CinematicCamera (moved out / removed from core paths)
breakingChangesHighSignal.colorManagement: THREE.ColorManagement is enabled by default since r152. renderer.outputColorSpace defaults to SRGBColorSpace. Set colorSpace=SRGBColorSpace on color textures (albedo/emissive/env); leave data textures (normal/roughness/metalness/AO) in NoColorSpace/LinearSRGBColorSpace.
breakingChangesHighSignal.renderLoop: Use renderer.setAnimationLoop(fn) rather than a hand-rolled requestAnimationFrame loop. It is mandatory for WebGPU (async device) and WebXR (XR frame timing).
breakingChangesHighSignal.webgpu: Since r171 'three/webgpu' WebGPURenderer is production-ready with automatic WebGL2 fallback. ShaderMaterial / RawShaderMaterial / onBeforeCompile are NOT supported on WebGPURenderer — use node materials + TSL. EffectComposer passes are replaced by the node post-processing stack (PostProcessing + pass nodes).
breakingChangesHighSignal.sRGBEncoding: The legacy *Encoding enums (sRGBEncoding, LinearEncoding) and texture.encoding are gone. Use texture.colorSpace and renderer.outputColorSpace with the *ColorSpace constants.
